name: superpaymaster
description: Gasless transactions and micropayments for Web3 agents. ERC-4337 gas sponsorship, x402 payment facilitation, streaming micropayments via payment channels.

gas-sponsorship.description: Sponsor gas fees for users via community tokens (xPNTs) instead of ETH

x402-settlement.description: HTTP 402 payment protocol for API monetization and agent services

micropayment-channels.description: Off-chain streaming payments with on-chain settlement

agent-identity.description: ERC-8004 agent registration and reputation-based sponsorship tiers

mcp.description: MCP payment required error with x-payment header
